Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: We transform our classic C-10 with bodywork and a flawless pearl two-tone finish.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 8: Pearlfection

Video.summary: Project Cream Puff gets air-ride and a supercharger for a slammed, powerful C-10 street machine.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: Transforming a junkyard Ford flathead into a classic hot rod V8.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Image.alt: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead
Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead
Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Video.summary: Engine guru Keith Dorton helps build our Ford flathead with 3/4 race cam, high compression heads and 3 deuces.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: 3 Deuce V8

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie refresh their 632 BBC for a street rod. New cam, EFI, and more!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 1

Video.summary: 632 BBC dyno time! Forged short block, heads, cam, EFI. Max HP tuning!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 2

Video.summary: Team creates over-the-top street/strip pickup wedging a nitrous-powered 427 big block into a compact S10.
Video.title: Lime Dime: 427 Big Block

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: The 1972 Chevelle barn find project needs a fuel system to support the 1000 horsepower engine.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle Payoff

Video.summary: We're getting a '96 Honda ready for the rally dirt track!
Video.title: Honda Rally Car

Video.summary: Our Chevy Low-Fi S-10 project continues and today is front suspension teardown and upgrades
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Video.summary: We send our S-10 out to an expert who will create and install a custom audio system and interior.

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Video.summary: We are on the home stretch of our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Slam Project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Video.summary: The final touches are added to our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Truck project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Video.summary: '89 Chevy Silverado sport truck: shakedown run, dyno test, then stripped to the frame for transformation.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 1 Bare Bones

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS frame mods: boxing plates, fuel tank mockup, clutch install, drivetrain drop.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 3 Building Blocks

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Video.summary: Old school sheet metal tricks to convert classic '49 Ford into a custom with suicide doors.
Video.title: Project Banana Split - Deadly Doors

Video.summary: How to convert from manual door handles to electric door poppers and punch custom hood louvers.
Video.title: Punch Job

Video.summary: Hands on tech on how to graft in '55 Olds lamps.
Video.title: Custom Headlights & Tail Lamps

Video.summary: Team fabs custom fiberglass bubble skirts and lays down a two-tone paint job on our old school '49 Ford custom
Video.title: Banana Split: Skirts & Paint

Video.summary: Team transplants hopped up 3-duce flathead into old school custom.
Video.title: Flatheads Rule

Video.summary: Secrets on fabricating a custom interior and how muscle car sheet metal panels are made and tested
Video.title: Hot Rod How-to: Interiors

Video.summary: How to upgrade a Mopar interior.
Video.title: Resto-Mod Interior

Video.summary: We fire up Banana Split and install old school exhaust flame throwers.
Video.title: Fire In The Hole

Video.summary: A good find: Marc and Tommy go on the hunt for a certain top-shelf Mopar.
Video.title: Hard Charger

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Dodge Charger needs some sheet metal replaced.
Video.title: Hard Charger: Heavy Metal

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew cuts a rusty old floor out of a '69 Dodge Charger and replace it.
Video.title: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Image.alt: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Video.summary: The time has come to paint Project Hard Charger.
Video.title: Hard Charger…or Midnight Rider?

Video.summary: Work continues on a 1969 Dodge Charger to adapt a Hellcat drivetrain to work in it; Tommy visits OPGI.
Video.title: Hard Charger – Hellcrate Install

Video.summary: How-to bolt on 150 HP with a wet-nitrous system, install a bed-mounted radiator and index J-wire spark plugs.
Video.title: Lime Dime: More Power

Video.summary: Team dials in Lime Dime drag truck at the strip.
Video.title: Race Track Tuning

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn and restore it to its former glory.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle

Video.summary: Upgrading our '72 C-10 with new HVAC, sound dampening, and pro wiring tips for total comfort.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 10: Cool and Comfortable

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 10: Cool and Comfortable
Chevy C-10 - Part 10: Cool and Comfortable
